attached_docs: KFM GitHub Repository Documentation Implementation Agent v3.1

validation_gates.reason: Verified repository identity and admin permission, default-branch base 7af05fc50e5a1bab28b314532b0a66d2839a229b, target source-admission stub and blob, issue-intake boundary, security policy, source-admission process, SourceDescriptor standard and contract, source registry README, proposed ADR-0017, receipt schema, and absence of overlapping open work.

Preserved the original proposal to admit a source under data/registry/sources while adding descriptor-level and record-level admission, identity, role, authority, rights, sensitivity, cadence, access, citation, source-head, validation, quarantine, activation, disable, and downstream-boundary requirements.

Parsed front matter with name/about/title/labels/assignees; verified balanced comments and code fences, final newline, required section inventory, empty unverified labels, and assignment to verified repository owner bartytime4life.

The template prohibits secrets, restricted payloads, exact sensitive locations, private records, unauthorized scraping, access-control bypass, and unapproved live tests; routes security-sensitive details to SECURITY.md; and keeps the issue separate from rights, sensitivity, consent, access, and activation authority.

The template fixes source role at admission, separates admission from promotion/publication, requires fixture-before-connector, routes invalid or unresolved material to quarantine/deny/hold, preserves watcher-as-non-publisher, and requires finite triage plus disable/rollback posture.

The template points reviewers to current contract/schema vocabulary without silently reconciling older role vocabularies, the source versus sources schema-path conflict, or the data/registry/sources versus source_descriptors relationship; those remain visible verification items.
Computed SHA-256 48a31dddc9617fbf146938c71c1a531f697af941582a2cdb7f6ad598a662edeb and Git blob SHA 0536d87840a0cf087673197dcf49a07708bff82b; GitHub returned the same blob SHA after the update.

The template is not yet on the default branch. Issue chooser rendering, project automation, live labels, verified source-reviewer teams, branch/review enforcement, and source-admission workflow automation remain NEEDS VERIFICATION after merge.

notes: AI-authored replacement of the public source-admission issue-template stub on a scoped review branch. The artifact structures proposal intake and triage only. It does not admit a source, create or approve a SourceDescriptor, decide rights, sensitivity, sovereignty, consent, or access, activate a connector, authorize a fetch or RAW write, approve promotion or release, or prove source claims. ADR-0017 remains proposed. Human review remains pending.
